name: You Wake Up With a Succubus Mark
description:
One day, you wake up feeling a bit different. You look down at your body and notice something drawn on you. You look it up and find out that thing is called a succubus mark, and it has weird powers.

Will you stay home, afraid of the mark's power, or will you fight it head on ? Or maybe it's all bogus, and someone just drew this on you as a a prank. Who knows ?

(made this because I couldn't find one on here)

WHAT YOU MAY ENCOUNTER (CONTENT WARNING):

  • Noncon & Dubcon

  • Abuse & Violence

  • Groping & Molestation

  • Misogyny

  • Brainwashing

  • Pregnancy

  • Death of fetus (you'll understand)

  • Body modification (bimbofication and sissification, more significant for male bodies)

This is my very first bot, all criticism welcome !
